title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket Ventures Solutions family as a Senior Software Engineer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
